team_name: Dhiyanta: A Multi-Agent AI Platform for Secure, Transparent, and Auditable Tender Evaluation
summary: Design a technical platform for AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement that uses a multi-agent AI system, intelligent document processing, explainable AI, immutable audit trail, and human-in-the-loop interface.
optimization_claims: Delivers higher accuracy and deeper understanding than a single, general-purpose model.
Eliminates manual data entry and errors from misinterpretation of unstructured documents.
Builds trust and ensures human expertise is applied where it matters most—in cases of ambiguity.
